channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Florence Pugh-led ‘The Midnight Library’ sparks major studio competition at Cannes Film Market
item.description: Florence Pugh’s upcoming fantasy drama “The Midnight Library” has become one of the most sought-after projects at the Cannes Film Market, attracting significant interest from several major Hollywood s...

item.title: Rosanna Schiaffino, Italian Actress and 1960s Cinema Star
item.description: Rosanna Schiaffino (1939–2009) was an Italian actress who became one of the notable figures of European cinema during the post-neorealist period, especially throughout the late 1950s and 1960s. She in...

item.title: Yanga Face Namungo in Crucial Mainland Premier League Title Race Match
item.description: Defending Mainland Premier League champions Yanga SC are preparing for an important league fixture against Namungo FC at the KMC Complex in Dar es Salaam. The match is significant for Yanga as they co...

item.title: PSX starts shortened trading week strongly as KSE-100 surges over 4,000 points amid improved global sentiment
item.description: The Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) began its shortened trading week on a strong bullish note on Monday, with the benchmark KSE-100 Index witnessing a significant intraday surge of more than 4,000 point...

item.title: Brumbies face complex finals ladder scenarios ahead of crucial Moana Pasifika clash
item.description: ACT Brumbies captain Allan Alaalatoa has called for the team to field its strongest possible side as they head into a decisive final-round Super Rugby clash against Moana Pasifika, with finals positio...

item.title: 75-year-old Norfolk County resident dies in two-vehicle collision in Ontario
item.description: A 75-year-old resident of Norfolk County has died following a serious two-vehicle collision in Ontario. According to the report, emergency services responded to the crash scene after two vehicles were...

item.title: Huawei announces new chip design approach targeting 1.4-nanometer-class performance despite US sanctions
item.description: Huawei Technologies has announced a new chip design strategy that it says could deliver transistor density equivalent to 1.4-nanometer processes within the next five years, even as US export restricti...

item.title: At least 4 dead and 17 missing after collapse of unfinished hotel in the Philippines
item.description: Rescue operations are underway in the Philippines after an unfinished hotel building collapsed, leaving at least four people dead and 17 others still missing. Authorities report that most of those una...

item.title: Farage faces scrutiny over undeclared £5m gift as Reform UK alleges Russian-linked cyberattack
item.description: Nigel Farage and Reform UK are facing growing political pressure following revelations about a £5 million personal gift allegedly received from crypto entrepreneur Christopher Harborne before Farage r...

item.title: Police confirm attack on Kwara police station and Emir’s palace, 10 abducted
item.description: The Nigeria Police have confirmed a coordinated terrorist attack on the Yashikira Police Divisional Headquarters and the palace of the Emir of Yashikira in Kaiama Local Government Area of Kwara State....

item.title: Okporowo Vanguard Supports Boat Mishap Victims and Families in Ogbakiri with Financial Aid
item.description: A socio-cultural group known as Okporowo Vanguard has extended sympathy and financial assistance to victims and families affected by a recent boat mishap in Okporowo-Ogbakiri Community, Emohua Local G...

item.title: Vintage Portraits of Italian Actress Lea Massari from the 1950s and 1960s
item.description: This article presents a curated collection of vintage portraits of Italian actress Lea Massari, focusing on photographs taken during the 1950s and 1960s, a formative and influential period in her earl...

item.title: Colliers CEO makes US$29 million insider purchase as shares remain under pressure
item.description: A recent insider trading report highlights significant buying activity by a senior executive at Colliers International Group Inc. Global chairman and chief executive officer Jay Hennick invested more ...

item.title: 1994 Hijacking of Air France Flight 8969 by Armed Islamic Group Terrorists
item.description: On December 24, 1994, Air France Flight 8969, an Airbus A300, was hijacked at Algiers’ Houari Boumediene Airport by four armed members of the Armed Islamic Group (GIA) of Algeria. The terrorists took ...

item.title: Calls for royal commission into Defence procurement and Collins-class submarine program over repeated government mismanagement
item.description: The article argues that Australia’s Department of Defence has a persistent pattern of misleading successive governments, particularly in relation to major procurement and capability projects. It focus...

item.title: Japan considers missile and naval transfers to Philippines amid strengthened defense cooperation
item.description: The article discusses the growing defense partnership between Japan and the Philippines, highlighting how both countries are strengthening military cooperation in response to rising security challenge...

item.title: Durban baby home provides temporary care for abandoned infants while supporting vulnerable mothers
item.description: A Durban-based baby home, Baby Home Durban North, is providing temporary care and a family-style environment for abandoned and relinquished infants while they await either reunification with biologica...

item.title: Early Career Breakthrough of Myrna Loy Through Henry Waxman’s Portraits for What Price Beauty? (1928)
item.description: This article explores an early and formative moment in the career of actress Myrna Loy, highlighting how photographer Henry Waxman played a key role in bringing her initial Hollywood attention. Loy ha...

item.title: Experts encourage positive parenting approaches to help children learn from mistakes
item.description: Child development experts are calling on parents to change how they respond when children make mistakes, warning that harsh reactions can damage creativity and problem-solving skills. According to edu...

item.title: Neon and Iggy Azalea clarify they are not dating amid livestream speculation
item.description: Neon and Iggy Azalea have been the subject of widespread online speculation regarding a possible romantic relationship, largely driven by their frequent livestream appearances and playful on-screen ch...
